title: CVE-2025-14174
summary: Google has reported a critical security vulnerability affecting iOS devices, which allowed hackers to fully compromise the devices through a complex exploit called DarkSword. A patch is available in iOS version 26.3, and it's essential for all users to update their devices immediately. If updating is not possible, enabling Lockdown Mode can provide additional security protection.
handling_warnings: Ensure Lockdown Mode is enabled if updates cannot be applied
Monitor devices for any unusual activities after update
unknowns: Specific versions of iOS that are still affected
Details on how soon patches will be available for all devices

inferred_facts.exploit_impact: Critical, full device compromise is possible
